hooks.command: sh -lc 'PLUGIN_DIR="$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/terzigolu/ccwatch/current"; [ -d "$PLUGIN_DIR" ] || PLUGIN_DIR=$(find "$HOME/.claude/plugins/cache" -mindepth 3 -maxdepth 3 -type d -path "*/ccwatch/*" 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -n 1); [ -n "$PLUGIN_DIR" ] || exit 0; exec node "$PLUGIN_DIR/dist/cli.js" repair'
